matrix.source_summary: FreshBooks feature list explicit; QB source too sparse; others are full accounting platforms with double-entry implied but not named
Wave and Pilot feature lists explicit; all other sources omit the term
Xero, FreshBooks, and Zoho feature lists explicit; Wave and FreeAgent have bank feeds/connections implying reconciliation
Xero, Wave, FreshBooks, Zoho, Pilot, and FreeAgent feature lists all explicit; Bench has financial account automation
Xero, Wave, FreshBooks, Zoho, and FreeAgent feature lists explicit; Pilot covers via full AR
FreshBooks and Zoho feature lists explicit; most other sources do not surface the term
Wave, FreshBooks, Zoho (quotes), and FreeAgent feature lists all explicit
Xero, FreshBooks, Sage, Zoho, Pilot, and FreeAgent feature lists explicit; Wave has receipt scanning only
Wave (auto-categorization), Bench (transaction categorization), and FreshBooks feature lists explicit
Xero, Wave, Sage (AP automation), Zoho, Pilot, and FreeAgent feature lists explicit
FreshBooks, Sage (AP automation), and Pilot explicit; Xero and Zoho imply AP via bill entry and purchase orders
Sage (AR automation) and Pilot (full AR) explicit; others implied via invoicing and online payment features
Xero, Sage, NetSuite, and Zoho feature lists all explicit; absent from Wave, FreshBooks, and FreeAgent sources
Xero, Wave, FreshBooks, Sage, Pilot, and FreeAgent feature lists explicit; Zoho Books source omits payroll; NetSuite has employee management only
Xero and Zoho feature lists explicit; FreshBooks has tax time reports only; absent from Wave, Bench, Pilot, FreeAgent sources

Zoho 'document autoscans/receipt autoscans', Xero Hubdoc data capture, FreeAgent 'smart capture', FreshBooks multi-mode receipt scanning
Sage 'multi-entity accounting' explicit; NetSuite ERP feature set and scale; Pilot 'complex business structure support'
Sage 'audit trails and controls' explicit; Zoho Books 'audit trail' in features list

explicitly listed in Zoho Books feature set only
Bench (document organization), Zoho Books (document management + autoscans), FreeAgent (files storage)
explicitly listed in Zoho Books feature set only
Sage features list + NetSuite differentiators (industry verticals via SuiteApps)
Wave (cash flow dashboard), Pilot (cash flow scenario modeling + dashboards), FreeAgent (cashflow overview)

explicitly listed in Xero features; FreshBooks 'business health reports' is adjacent but not equivalent
FreshBooks (client account portal), Zoho Books (customer portal explicitly listed)
explicitly listed in Zoho Books feature set only
QuickBooks features list; NetSuite self-describes as #1 Cloud ERP; Sage lists cloud ERP and cloud financials; universal across all sources
QuickBooks features list (desktop application), Zoho Books (Windows desktop app)
Xero (onboarding specialists, 90-day dedicated support), Wave (software migration onboarding), FreshBooks (onboarding services explicitly listed)
Sage (AP/AR automation, AI agents), Zoho Books (workflow automation explicitly listed); partial forms across most other sources
Xero (invoice reminders), Wave (late payment reminders), FreshBooks (late payment reminders + scheduled late fees), Zoho Books (payment reminders automation)
explicitly listed in Zoho Books feature set only; not surfaced in other source data
Xero bank connections, Wave bank transaction auto-import, FreshBooks automated bank import, Zoho bank feeds, FreeAgent bank feeds — all explicit feature lists
FreshBooks explicit 'automated client emails with dynamic fields'; others limited to reminders or AR automation
FreshBooks feature list only; no other source explicitly lists scheduled late fees
Bench explicit 'in-app messaging', Pilot 'in-app messaging support', Zoho 'in-app collaboration with chat'

FreshBooks explicit 'accountant access', FreeAgent 'accountant and bookkeeper access', Xero partner network, Pilot dedicated team
FreshBooks explicit 'team members'; Zoho custom user roles/field-level access; Xero flat per-team pricing implies multi-user; NetSuite employee management
FreeAgent explicit 'practice dashboard'; Xero explicit 'Xero Practice Manager'; Zoho Practice is a separate product
